tracks.rawText: 0:07[Rec] Apr 30 18:07:02UploadReggaeton with a heavy dembow rhythm, A deep, sub-heavy kick drum drives the beat at 90 BPM in the key of G minor, The snare hits on the eighth-note syncopations characteristic of the genre, A bright, plucked acoustic guitar plays a repetitive melodic hook using staccato notes, A smooth male tenor vocal performs melodic phrases with rhythmic delivery, The bassline consists of a sustained sub-bass that follows the root notes of the guitar progression, High-frequency percussion includes a crisp shaker and a subtle hi-hat pattern1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Apr 30 18:07:02

tracks.rawText: 0:09[Rec] Apr 30 18:06:50UploadReggaeton track featuring a syncopated dembow rhythm at 90 BPM in the key of G minor, The percussion consists of a heavy, rounded kick drum on every beat with a sharp, high-frequency snare hitting on the sixteenth-note offbeats, A melodic, plucked synth riff plays a repetitive four-bar loop using a short decay and light delay, The bassline is a sub-heavy sine wave that follows the root notes of the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with pitch correction and a short plate reverb, delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style, Occasional atmospheric synth pads provide harmonic backing in the mid-range1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Apr 30 18:06:50

tracks.rawText: 0:09[Rec] Apr 30 18:06:35UploadReggaeton featuring a male vocalist, The rhythm is defined by a dembow drum pattern with a heavy, rounded kick drum and a crisp, dry snare hitting on the eighth-note offbeats, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the kick pattern, The melodic arrangement consists of a repetitive, staccato synth pluck riff and a sustained, high-frequency synth pad, The male vocals are processed with noticeable pitch correction and a short plate reverb, 95 BPM, G minor, 4/4 time signature1PublishRemix
tracks.title: [Rec] Apr 30 18:06:35

tracks.rawText: 3:30Black Mambv5.5Psychedelic rock with virtuosic guitar leads: fuzzed-out electric riffs, octave-doubled solos, and improvisatory bends through a wah pedal and tape echo, Swirling Leslie organ, driving bass, tom-heavy drums, and roomy live-room reverb create a dense, hallucinatory, abrasive edge1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Black Mamb

tracks.rawText: 1:52Black Mambv5.5Psychedelic rock with virtuosic guitar leads: fuzzed-out electric riffs, octave-doubled solos, and improvisatory bends through a wah pedal and tape echo, Swirling Leslie organ, driving bass, tom-heavy drums, and roomy live-room reverb create a dense, hallucinatory, abrasive edge1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Black Mamb

tracks.rawText: 3:24Glass on the Floorv5.5Pop rock with ska guitar chops and reggae-fusion bounce at a midtempo groove; verse rides clipped bass and clean skank guitar, pre-chorus opens with tom lifts and layered harmonies, chorus hits with big singalong drums and bright gang doubles, Lead vocal stays close-mic and conversational, with echoed last words and chant stacks on the hook, Ear candy includes reverse cymbal swells, offbeat claps, and a horn stab on the turn, Crisp, warm, radio-ready mix with punchy low end, pop, rock, alternative rock, reggae fusion, ska3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Glass on the Floor
